hook:
The Muslim app market is wide open.

30 days until Ramadan.
2 billion potential users.
$0 competition for most niches.

Here's the opportunity nobody's talking about:
tweets:
The numbers:

- 2 billion Muslims worldwide
- 70% under age 30
- $2.2 trillion Islamic economy
- Prayer apps alone: $50M+/year market

Muslim Pro makes $30-40M/year. One app.

What exists:

- Prayer time apps (saturated)
- Quran apps (saturated)
- Halal restaurant finders (some competition)

What doesn't exist:

- Muslim habit trackers
- Islamic finance apps
- Muslim dating apps (taboo but huge demand)
- Ramadan-specific apps
- Kids Islamic education

The Ramadan opportunity:

30 days of fasting = behavior change.

Apps people want:
- Fasting timer with dua reminders
- Quran completion tracker (finish in 30 days)
- Charity tracker (Zakat calculator)
- Iftar meal planner

Ship before March 1st. Ride the wave.

Why this market is underserved:

1. Most app devs are secular
2. Cultural nuance required
3. English-first apps miss Arabic speakers
4. Low competition = high App Store ranking

A decent Islamic app ranks top 10 easily.

Monetization works differently:

- Ads perform well (high CPMs in Muslim-majority countries)
- Subscriptions: $2.99-9.99/month sweet spot
- In-app donations (sadaqah) convert well
- Premium features for Ramadan

Muslim Pro charges $6/month. 500k+ subscribers.

My build plan:

1. PrayerLock: Screen blocker during prayer times
2. Ramadan countdown + fasting tracker
3. Islamic habit streaks (5 daily prayers, Quran reading)

All use same core codebase. Different positioning.

The content play:

TikTok/IG Reels about Islamic productivity.

"POV: You can't open TikTok until you pray Fajr"

Muslim content creators have massive engagement.

1 viral video = 50k downloads.

Technical notes:

- Prayer time calculation: Use Adhan.js (MIT license)
- Hijri calendar: moment-hijri
- Qibla direction: Device compass + location
- Arabic support: RTL layout in React Native

90% of the work is already done. Just assemble it.
cta:
Building PrayerLock right now.

Shipping before Ramadan.

Follow @PRINTMAXXER for the build log and launch.

Who else is building for this market?
